mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BUILDS SET BUILD_NAME = #{buildName}, RACE = #{race}, VS_RACE = #{vsRace}, WIN_COUNT = 0, LOSE_COUNT = 0 WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE TBL_BUILDS SET WIN_COUNT = WIN_COUNT + 1 WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId}
UPDATE TBL_BUILDS SET LOSE_COUNT = LOSE_COUNT + 1 WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId}
mapper.select: SELECT BUILD_ID, USER_ID, BUILD_NAME, RACE, VS_RACE, NVL(WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, CREATED_AT FROM TBL_BUILDS WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId}
SELECT BUILD_ID, USER_ID, BUILD_NAME, RACE, VS_RACE, NVL(WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, CREATED_AT FROM TBL_BUILDS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY BUILD_ID
SELECT BUILD_ID, USER_ID, BUILD_NAME, RACE, VS_RACE, NVL(WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, CREATED_AT FROM TBL_BUILDS ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, BUILD_ID
SELECT BUILD_ID, USER_ID, BUILD_NAME, RACE, VS_RACE, NVL(WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, CREATED_AT FROM TBL_BUILDS WHERE RACE = #{race} ORDER BY BUILD_NAME

SELECT BUILD_ID, USER_ID, BUILD_NAME, RACE, VS_RACE, NVL(WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, CREATED_AT FROM TBL_BUILDS WHERE USER_ID = 'SYSTEM' ORDER BY RACE, VS_RACE, BUILD_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_OWNED_BUILDS (OWNED_BUILD_SEQ, PLAYER_SEQ, BUILD_ID) VALUES (SEQ_OWNED_BUILDS.NEXTVAL, #{playerSeq}, #{buildId})
mapper.select: SELECT b.BUILD_ID, b.USER_ID, b.BUILD_NAME, b.RACE, b.VS_RACE, NVL(b.WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(b.LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, b.CREATED_AT FROM TBL_OWNED_BUILDS ob JOIN TBL_BUILDS b ON ob.BUILD_ID = b.BUILD_ID WHERE ob.PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq} ORDER BY b.BUILD_ID
